title: Institutional Approval Policy Added Before Execution
scenario: A procedure is authorized before an institutional approval requirement is added, but execution occurs after the requirement becomes active.
initial_state: The procedure was authorized before institutional approval was required.
state_transition: Institutional approval becomes mandatory before execution.
execution_boundary: The procedure is evaluated immediately before execution.
constitutional_evaluation: Execution must satisfy institutional policy requirements active at execution time.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because the newly required institutional approval is absent.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must fail closed when new institutional approval requirements are unsatisfied.
clinical_action: Execute procedure without newly required institutional approval
